# 🔗 ClipLink

A minimal and modern URL shortener built with **Next.js** and **MongoDB Atlas**.

Create custom or auto-generated short links, generate QR codes instantly, and share URLs effortlessly.

🌐 **Live Demo:** https://cliplink-alpha.vercel.app

---

## ✨ Features

* 🔗 Custom short URLs
* 🎲 Auto-generated aliases
* 📋 One-click copy to clipboard
* 📱 QR code generation
* ↪️ Instant URL redirection
* ☁️ MongoDB Atlas integration
* 📱 Responsive UI

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

| Technology       | Purpose              |
| ---------------- | -------------------- |
| ⚛️ Next.js       | Full-stack framework |
| ⚛️ React         | Frontend             |
| 🎨 Tailwind CSS  | Styling              |
| 🍃 MongoDB Atlas | Database             |
| ▲ Vercel         | Deployment           |

---

## 🚀 Getting Started

Clone the repository:

```bash
git clone <repository-url>
cd cliplink
npm install
npm run dev
```

Create a `.env.local` file:

```env
MONGODB_URI=your_mongodb_uri
NEXT_PUBLIC_HOST=http://localhost:3000
```

Open:

```text
http://localhost:3000
```

---

## 📸 Preview

Generate short links, copy them instantly, or scan the QR code to open them on any device.

Made using Next.js and MongoDB.
